top_signals.title: Good Medicine Is Combat Power: Clinical Innovation and the Lessons of the Russo-Ukrainian War
top_signals.summary:
War is a brutal driver of medical innovation. Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine has forced clinicians and commanders alike to confront a hard truth: Survival depends not only on tactics and technology, but on the ability to deliver advanced care under fire, evacuate and resuscitate the wounded, and preserve fighting strength despite repeated attacks on healthcare systems.Ukraine’s experience has reshaped combat medicine through necessity, resilience, and improvisation. The central question is no longer whether NATO can observe these lessons, but whether it can build a system bold enough to capture, test, scale, and field them at wartime speed. The NATO

The post Good Medicine Is Combat Power: Clinical Innovation and the Lessons of the Russo-Ukrainian War appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: La nueva Fed de Kevin Warsh
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh superó su primer gran examen al frente de la Reserva Federal. La Fed mantuvo las tasas sin cambios, pero los mercados reforzaron las apuestas a una posible subida en octubre. Mientras tanto, Warsh ya comenzó a introducir cambios dentro del banco central. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apollo Faces Rising Redemption Pressure
top_signals.summary: Apollo is again capping withdrawals from its flagship private credit fund after investors requested redemptions far above the 5% limit. Bloomberg's Silas Brown joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the biggest private credit firms may be the most exposed to retail investor outflows and why the next quarter could reveal whether this is a temporary reaction or a broader industry risk. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: BHP strike averted for now, but sides still 'some way' from deal
Largest wind farm in the United States slated to begin commercial operations
top_signals.summary: The SunZia Wind Project, the largest wind farm in the United States, is slated to begin commercial operations this month. The wind farm, located in New Mexico, has a total net summer generating capacity of 3,650 megawatts (MW) and is composed of 916 wind turbines. SunZia's capacity is more than three times larger than the next two largest wind farms, Alta Wind in Southern California (1,098 MW) and Great Prairie in northern Texas (1,027 MW). The SunZia Wind Project works with a high voltage transmission line to deliver the wind power generated to Arizona and California.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
